title: Marah #4785
definition:
Marah = "bitter"

 1) the spring with bitter water which was 3 days travel from the
     crossing place of the Red Sea in the peninsula of Sinai
nasbUsage:
Definition: Marah = "bitter"

 1) the spring with bitter water which was 3 days travel from the
     crossing place of the Red Sea in the peninsula of Sinai

    NASB:  a bitter spring in the Sinai peninsula
